description: A customer is traveling for three months and wants to suspend their line to avoid charges.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and explain the terms of a temporary suspension (e.g., reduced fee, duration limits).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the vacation suspension policy.

nodes.task_description: Process the suspension request for the specified start and end dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the suspension to the account for the correct date range.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the suspension details and the automatic reactivation date with the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear summary of the action taken.
